introSection: NightFlight Expedition is an indoor steel water roller coaster built by German firm Mack Rides currently under construction at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is located inside a 160,000 square foot building. The ride experience will reportedly be 5.5 minutes, including loading and unloading.

sections.title: History
sections.content: On November 18, 2025, one of the ride's boats was unveiled at Mack Rides' booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

fullText:
NightFlight Expedition is an indoor steel water roller coaster built by German firm Mack Rides currently under construction at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA.

The ride is located inside a 160,000 square foot building. The ride experience will reportedly be 5.5 minutes, including loading and unloading.

On November 18, 2025, one of the ride's boats was unveiled at Mack Rides' booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.
